message: You are planning your trip in Cambridge
You are looking for a place to dine. The restaurant should be in the centre and should be in the expensive price range
The restaurant should serve korean food
Once you find the restaurant you want to book a table for 2 people at 20:00 on friday
Make sure you get the reference number
You are also looking for a train. The train should go to cambridge and should be on the same day as the restaurant booking
The train should depart from london liverpool street and should arrive by 11:15
Once you find the train you want to make a booking for the same group of people
Make sure you get the reference number
